See [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) for the project guide, tech stack, structure, and constraints. Run `pnpm check` before opening a PR.

Style: imperative commit messages, concise. Match the existing Biome config (100-char lines, 2-space indent). Don't introduce HTML5 drag-and-drop, Radix dropdown/context-menus, or `trafficLightPosition` overrides — see CLAUDE.md for why.
